title: UIC Campus Pathfinder
description: Custom Dijkstra's algorithm implementation finding shortest paths between UIC buildings using OpenStreetMap data.
overview: An efficient campus navigation system that finds the shortest path between UIC buildings using real OpenStreetMap data and Dijkstra's shortest path algorithm.

sections.heading: What I Built
bullets: Coded an adjacency matrix to store information regarding building locations in hashmaps for O(1) time complexity
Used .osm files as a data source to parse real-world geographic data from OpenStreetMap
Implemented a custom Dijkstra shortest path algorithm optimized for campus-scale pathfinding
Used a stack data structure to display the complete shortest path from one location to another
Optimized for performance with efficient data structures and algorithm implementation
